title: ForceCheckEnabled Property
description:
This property sets the end conditions of the force guide object related to force.

Values

True Enable the end conditions related to force.

False Disable the end conditions related to force.

Default:  False

See Also: ForceCheckEnabled Property

ForceCheckMode Property
see_also:
Applies To

Relax Object, SurfaceAligh Object, PressProbe Object, Press Object, PressMove
